Identity.Name: StingLocationCodes
Identity.Definition: Location / building codes for the second segment (LOC) of the STING 8-segment tag. This is a PROJECT-SCOPED TEMPLATE — the values shipped here are placeholders that every project replaces with its actual building / site codes via the project-overlay file at <project>/_BIM_COORD/enums/StingLocationCodes.xml. Per-element LOC values must additionally match the LocationCode property of an IfcBuilding in the same IFC project (cross-entity IDS rule).

Governance.Maintainer: STING Tools (Planscape) — template only; values are project-owned
Governance.StandardsBasis: ISO 19650-2 §5.3 spatial structure; STING ParamRegistry.AllLocationCodes; cross-bound to IfcBuilding via Pset_StingSpatialCodes

Value.Definition: PLACEHOLDER — Primary building. Projects replace the code (e.g. MAIN, NORTH, A) and definition with site-specific names.
External works on the project site (not inside any building). Reserved code — projects do not redefine.
External to project site (off-site infrastructure, utility tie-ins, neighbouring contexts). Reserved code.
Unknown / not yet assigned. IDS fails at Stage 3+.
Wildcard for routing rules. Never tagged on an element.
